tags.name: uui-color-swatch
tags.description: Color swatch, can have label and be selectable, disabled or readonly.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value of the swatch. This will become the color value if color is left undefined, see the property `color` for more details.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Color of the swatch. Should be a valid hex, hexa, rgb, rgba, hsl or hsla string. Should fulfill this [css spec](https://www.w3.org/TR/css-color-4/#color-type). If not provided element will look at its text content.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets the swatch to readonly mode.

attributes.name: show-label
attributes.description: When true shows element label below the color checkbox

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Enable the ability to select this element.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Attribute applied when the element is selected.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Set this boolean to true for then the related composition is sorted.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Value of the swatch. This will become the color value if color is left undefined, see the property `color` for more details.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Color of the swatch. Should be a valid hex, hexa, rgb, rgba, hsl or hsla string. Should fulfill this [css spec](https://www.w3.org/TR/css-color-4/#color-type). If not provided element will look at its text content.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Sets the swatch to readonly mode.

properties.name: showLabel
properties.description: When true shows element label below the color checkbox

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

properties.name: selectable
properties.description: Enable the ability to select this element.

properties.name: selected
properties.description: Attribute applied when the element is selected.

properties.name: active
properties.description: Set this boolean to true for then the related composition is sorted.

events.name: selected
events.description: fires when the media card is selected

events.name: deselected
events.description: fires when the media card is deselected
